User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information about users who login and use the 3D Customizer app.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's Google avatar image

createdAt.description: When the user profile was created

lastActive.description: When the user last opened or used the application

Admin.title: Administrator
Admin.description: Uuids of administrators or developers who can manage users.

addedAt.description: When this admin was added to the database

/users/{userId}.description: Stores secure profiles of individual users, keyed by Firebase Auth UID.

/admins/{adminId}.description: List of system operators, developers or admins, keyed by Firebase Auth UID.
